name: CDT Equity Inc.
summary: PART I Overview On September 22, 2023, a merger transaction (the Business Combination) between Conduit Pharmaceuticals Limited (Old Conduit), Murphy Canyon Acquisition Corp (MURF) and Conduit Merger Sub, Inc., a Cayman Islands exempted company and a wholly owned subsidiary of MURF (Merger Sub), was completed pursuant to the Agreement and Plan of Merger, dated November 8, 2022, as amended, (the Merger Agreement).
